steps: Go to https://dnsimple.com and log in or create an account
Click on your name/avatar in the top right and select 'Account Settings', or go directly to https://dnsimple.com/user
Scroll down to the 'Access Tokens' section
Enter a name for the token and click 'Generate token'
Copy the token immediately — it will not be displayed again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your DNSimple API access token. Used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

notes: Free sandbox environment available at sandbox.dnsimple.com for testing
Two token types: user tokens (access all accounts the user belongs to) and account tokens (scoped to one account)
For production automation, account tokens are recommended for least-privilege access
Token is shown only once at creation — store it securely
Sandbox API base URL is https://api.sandbox.dnsimple.com/v2

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve details about the currently authenticated user or account
